name: Barbecue Sauce- Justin Wilson's
recipeInstructions:
1. 3 cups chopped onions
2. 1/4 cup honey
3. 1 tablespoon garlic, chopped
4. 2 tablespoons lemon juice
5. 1 cup sweet peppers, chopped
6. 1 tablespoon salt
7. 1/2 cup dried parsley
8. 3 tablespoons Lea & Perrins mustard
9. 1 cup dry white wine
10. 1/2 teaspoon dried mint
11. 3 tablespoons vinegar
12. 1 tablespoon liquid smoke
13. 2 cups ketchup
14. 1/2 tablespoon Louisiana hot sauce
Bring all ingredients to a boil in a pot large enough to hold them. Cook, covered, on low heat for several hours.
